title: Application for a Search of Citizenship Records - Canada.ca
content:
## Application for a Search of Citizenship Records
Get help to open an application form or to fill one out in the Help Centre .
This application is for persons requesting a search of citizenship records to verify citizenship and naturalization information.
The record letter cannot be used as proof of citizenship. For proof of citizenship, please use the Application for a Citizenship Certificate .
Before you apply online, make sure you have:
- the instruction guide to fill out the form
- a scanner or digital camera
- a valid credit or debit card
You need an account to apply online. Use it to pay your fees and check your status.
Once you start your online application, you have 60 days to submit it.
Create an account or sign in
- The instruction guide to prepare and submit your application
- Application for a search of citizenship records (CIT 0058) (opens in new tab) Get help to download, save and open this form
- Get help to download, save and open this form
- Read the instruction guide and download your application form
- Complete, sign and date your application form
- Submit your application
We accept credit cards and prepaid cards from:
- American Express ® , and
If you use a prepaid credit card, keep it for at least 18 months after you pay to make refunds easier.
We also accept all Visa Debit cards.
The card you use does not have to be in your name. The cardholder’s name will appear on the receipt but it does not need to match your application.
- be from a Canadian bank using INTERAC ® Online , and
- be registered for online banking through your bank’s website.
We also accept all Visa Debit cards. If your card has the Visa Debit logo on it, alone or with the INTERAC ® Online logo, select Visa Debit as your payment method.
The card you use does not have to be in your name. The cardholder’s name will appear on the receipt but it does not need to match your application.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
